title: Install as Standard User
originalDescription: - latest version installs on standard user account with no admin privileges
description:
Set OS culture to es-MX and try the following.

- latest version installs on standard user account with no admin privileges
stepDescription: Set es-MX, install latest Bloom as standard user.
checklistSteps: Sign in with a standard user account.
stepNotes: Verify the latest version installs without admin privileges.
bodyChecklistItems: Sign in with a standard user account.
Verify the latest version installs without admin privileges.

title: Install with Feedback Off
originalDescription:
- in environment variables, try a new machine install with FEEDBACK set to FALSE. Refer to BL-8947.
VM notes
description:
Set OS culture to es-MX and try the following.

- in environment variables, try a new machine install with FEEDBACK set to FALSE. Refer to BL-8947.
VM notes
stepDescription: Set es-MX, disable feedback, test clean-machine install.
checklistSteps: Set the FEEDBACK environment variable to FALSE.
Run a new-machine install, ideally on a VM.
bodyChecklistItems: Set the FEEDBACK environment variable to FALSE.
Run a new-machine install, ideally on a VM.
